description: Record an inter-operator settlement event. Sent by either operator to acknowledge reconciliation of cross-operator matching fees. References the x402 transaction or bilateral credit instrument. Both operators post a reconcile message to form a bilateral acknowledgment -- the reconciliation is complete when both messages exist and agree on the amount.

args.name: period_start
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the start of the reconciliation period.

args.name: period_end
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the end of the reconciliation period.

args.name: matches_completed
args.description: Number of cross-operator matches completed in this period.

args.name: gross_fees_micro_tokens
args.description: Total cross-operator fees accrued in this period in micro-tokens.

args.name: net_amount_micro_tokens
args.description: Net amount owed after bilateral netting. Positive means this operator is owed by the partner; negative means this operator owes the partner.

args.name: settlement_rail
args.description: Settlement rail used for this reconciliation.

args.name: settlement_ref
args.description: External settlement reference (e.g. x402 transaction ID). Required for x402 rail.

args.name: partner_reconcile_msg
args.description: Message ID of the partner's reconcile message for the same period. Present in the second reconcile message (bilateral acknowledgment).
